chapter_title: Removal of Parked and Abandoned Vehicles
text: If the vehicle is determined to have a value exceeding five hundred dollars ($500) pursuant to Section 22670, the lien shall be satisfied pursuant to Sections 3067 to 3074, inclusive, of the Civil Code.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 10. Removal of Parked and Abandoned Vehicles [22650 - 22856]
#### Article 2. Vehicle Disposition [22850 - 22856]
##### § 22851.4

If the vehicle is determined to have a value exceeding five hundred dollars ($500) pursuant to Section 22670, the lien shall be satisfied pursuant to Sections 3067 to 3074, inclusive, of the Civil Code.

*(Amended by Stats. 2004, Ch. 650, Sec. 13. Effective January 1, 2005.)*
